description: Three parallel tasks with full toolset — does the model emit multiple tool_calls with unique IDs?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. When asked to do multiple independent things, use multiple tool calls in a single response.
Do these three things at once: (1) find all .py files, (2) check the Python version, (3) read README.md.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files matching a glob pattern.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Expect 3 parallel calls: glob(pattern='**/*.py'), bash(cmd='python3 --version'), read(path='README.md'). Check: all IDs unique, all arguments well-formed, correct tool for each subtask.
